title: Drone Ecosystem & Applications
content: Event Date and year - (Ex-1st Jan 2023) 04th March 2023 Department of Electrical, Electronics & Communication Engineering organized webinar titled "Drone Ecosystems & Applications" on 04.03.2023 by S.Gabriel Vasanthakumaran , Asst. Manager "Lawrence & Mayo India pvt Ltd" to the students and faculties of GU. Seminar was conducted about Drone Ecosystem & Applications by S Gabriel Vasanthakumaran, Techno-Commercial Product Head - Scientific & Engineering Equipment’s. Event was inaugurated by by thanking Honorable Vice Chancellor sir for her continuous support for conducting this seminars. External expert S. Gabriel Vasanthakumaran shared about drone ecosystems & Applications. Session was fully interacting as there was very interesting slides shown on power point and students actively participated in online session. Mentor Name – Prof. (Dr.) R.Swaminathan Department Name – DEECE
